text.title: AI Feature Observability — Four Pillars Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the ai-feature-observability-four-pillars methodology.

example.title: Refund-agent observability — four pillars
example.narrative: Quality: weekly eval-on-sample run scores 89% (target 85%); Latency: p95 1.8s (target 2.5s); Cost: $0.41 per resolved ticket (target $0.50); Drift: input-distribution KL 0.08 (alert > 0.15) and judge-model pinned to claude-sonnet-4.7. Dashboards panel each pillar; alerts route to ml-on-call.
example.artifact: observability-spec.md with pillar table + dashboard config + alert thresholds.
